overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy night landscape. The character travels from a forested path through a swampy area with glowing marsh lights, passing a group of enemies and approaching ancient stone ruins.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path in heavy rain with weapons on his back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
thick bushes and small trees lining the left side
thick bushes and small trees lining the right side
dark storm clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow forest trail during a heavy storm at night. The path is flanked by dense vegetation on both sides while dark storm clouds cover the sky. The lighting is dim and atmospheric with a cool blue-green tint.

events.description: group of armed soldiers appears standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the group of enemies on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: group of armed soldiers standing guard on the roadside holding spears

entered.detail: grassy slope rising on the left side of the path
open marshy area visible ahead beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as Geralt approaches a group of armed soldiers standing on the right side of the path. The vegetation thins out revealing a grassy bank on the left and an open field ahead. The enemies stand motionless as Geralt passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp with dead trees and glowing lights

events.description: ground transitions from dirt path to swampy water and mud
glowing yellow marsh lights become visible in the distance among the trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow swamp water approaching the distant ruins

entered.detail: murky water covering the ground on the right side of the path
leafless dead trees scattered throughout the swamp
glowing yellow lights floating among the trees in the distance
ancient stone ruins visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a wide-open swamp where the ground becomes waterlogged and muddy. Dead trees dot the landscape while mysterious glowing yellow lights appear in the distance. Ancient stone ruins become visible on the horizon as the character wades through the shallow water.

events.description: large stone ruins become prominent ahead
path curves slightly left approaching the stone archway

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient stone ruins through the swamp

entered.detail: large ruined stone archway structure ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the ancient stone ruins as they grow larger in the frame. The path curves slightly left toward a prominent stone archway while dead trees pass by on the left. The swamp water remains on the right as the character nears the ruined structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy nocturnal wilderness that transforms from a claustrophobic forest trail into a wide, desolate swamp. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow path flanked by dense vegetation under a heavy storm and a cool blue-green light. As the forest opens up, the vegetation thins to reveal a grassy bank and a group of motionless armed soldiers standing by the roadside. The scene then shifts into a waterlogged swamp where the ground becomes muddy and dead trees emerge, punctuated by mysterious glowing yellow lights in the distance. Finally, the camera tracks Geralt as he wades through shallow water, curving toward a prominent stone archway and ancient ruins that grow larger on the horizon.
